locations.name: Edward William Nelson
locations.summary: Edward William Nelson (May 8, 1855 – May 19, 1934) was an American naturalist and ethnologist.

locations.name: 常綠森林
locations.summary: 常綠森林是由常綠樹木組成的森林。它們出現在廣泛的氣候帶中，包括寒冷氣候中的針葉樹和冬青樹等樹木，溫帶地區的桉樹、活橡樹、金合歡和班克樹，以及熱帶地區的雨林樹木。針葉溫帶常綠森林最常以科中的物種為主。樹木包括：松科和柏科。闊葉溫帶常綠森林包…

locations.name: 云雾森林
locations.summary: 云雾森林（cloud forest）是一种热带或亚热带常绿山地雨林。其特点是其林冠持续性，经常性或季节性的环绕着云雾。云雾森林的地面和植被上通常覆盖着丰富的苔藓，因此其也被称之为苔藓森林（mossy forest）。雲霧森林通常形成于山脉…

relations.subject: Varied solitaire
relations.evidence: The varied solitaire (Myadestes coloratus) is a Near Threatened species of bird in the family Turdidae, the thrushes. It is found in Colombia and Panama.Clements, J

relations.subject: Varied solitaire
relations.evidence: "Due to its high dependence on cloud forests, the species is threatened by the loss and degradation of its habitat...the impact of habitat loss on the population size is thought to be low." It is considered local and rare in Colombia. In Panama it occurs in several protected areas and is numerous in some of them
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
